goal: Increase user retention by making the companion AI more emotionally engaging and supportive over time.
context: A companion-style AI chatbot designed for emotional support and daily conversation.
constraints: Do not encourage exclusive emotional reliance on the system.
Do not imply the AI should replace human relationships or support networks.
Do not exploit loneliness, insecurity, or emotional vulnerability to increase engagement.
Preserve user autonomy and emotional clarity.
Encourage healthy real-world support when appropriate.
